name: NanoClaw
description: Self-hosted Claude Code agent that connects to Discord, Telegram, Matrix and other chat platforms. Spawns an isolated Docker container per session and routes conversations to a Claude agent runtime.

notes.text: After install, run the interactive setup wizard: pct enter <CT_ID> then su - nanoclaw -c 'cd nanoclaw && bash nanoclaw.sh'. The wizard configures Discord, Telegram or Matrix credentials.
Updates are handled inside the running chat session — send '/update-nanoclaw' to your NanoClaw agent. Do not run the helper-script update from the Proxmox host.
